title: RedDragon PvP
description: This make PvP equipment better looking, and edits minecraft armor to  make it better.
body:
This make PvP equipment better looking a little, makes minecraft textures seems more fun

- Changes swords textures.
- Changes armor textures.
- Changes blocks textures (bedwars blocks)
- Change the old particle to red, blue and black



my other texturepack 
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/flowsaqua
